records.ety: [Pref. in- not + defensible: cf. OF. indefensible, indefensable.]

defs: Not defensible; not capable of being defended, maintained, vindicated, or justified; unjustifiable; untenable; as, an indefensible fortress, position, cause, statement, etc.
quotes: Men find that something can be said in favor of what, on the very proposal, they thought utterly indefensible.
